titleStmt.title: Letter to Patrick English from his mother, Kate, 18 May 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Kate English

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: Kate English (b1855) was the mother of Patrick English (1894-1970) . This letter is part of a correspondence shared between Kate and Patrick during his imprisonment in 1916.In this letter, Kate expresses her concern for her son Patrick, following the Rising and his subsequent imprisonment in Frongoch. She mentions her relief on finding out that he was alive and that she will send on shoes and socks or anything else he may need.Patrick English was an Irish Volunteer imprisoned in the Stafford and later Frongoch Prisons. He had at least six cousins fighting with the British Army in France during his incarceration.

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
Dunsink Cottages Castleknock Co Dublin 18/5/1916 My Dear son Patrick I hope
you will have the pleasure of
reading this letter from me
My heart was broken about
you I could not make out
where you went to on Easter
Monday I was near wild
untill I saw your name in
the Paper but 'thank God'
you are alive I am all righ
my self I sleep in Jamesy's
and comes home in the
morning I am sure you
can imagine how lonely
for you the only one I have
but cheer up and trust in
God that we will meet again
I want to know if you would
be allowed to receive any shirt
or socks or any thing at all I
would send them on Jamesy
David Katie Nellie and all
join in sending their best
love to you and is Praying
night and day for the best
hoping you will get this to
let you know I am alive
x x x x I remain
Your loving
Mother K English
